surfaces.label: Outside

zones.label: Ink-Free Zone (Address + Postage)
zones.rule: No ink allowed. Must be completely white/blank. Reserved for recipient address and postage indicia.
zones.note: Top panel, positioned 0.15" from fold line and 0.275" from right edge

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the OUTSIDE of a 12×9" bifold self-mailer.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 12.25" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 12" — everything outside this is cut off.
Safe zone: 8.75" × 11.75" (0.125" inset from trim) — ALL text, logos, and critical content must stay inside this boundary.

This piece folds vertically at the 6" center line, creating two 9" × 6" panels (top and bottom). Finished size is 6" × 9".

Zone restrictions:
- INK-FREE ZONE: A 4" × 2.375" rectangle on the top panel, positioned 0.275" from the right edge and 0.15" above the center fold. Must be COMPLETELY WHITE — no ink, no background, no images. This is where the recipient address and postage are printed.

Design tips:
- The top panel (with the ink-free zone) is the address side when folded.
- The bottom panel is fully customizable on the outside.
- Extend background colors into the bleed to avoid white edges.
- Submit inside artwork upright — the printer inverts it during production.

surfaces.label: Inside

zones.label: Glue Zone
zones.rule: Adhesive is applied here to seal the mailer. Artwork CAN be placed here but may be obscured or damaged when opened. Avoid critical content.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the INSIDE of a 12×9" bifold self-mailer.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 12.25" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 12".
Safe zone: 8.75" × 11.75" (0.125" inset from trim).

This piece folds at 6" from top. The inside is fully revealed when the recipient opens the mailer.

Zone restrictions:
- GLUE ZONE: A ~0.375" strip along the top edge where adhesive seals the mailer. You CAN place artwork here, but it may be damaged when opened. Avoid critical text or CTAs.

Design tips:
- Both panels of the inside are fully customizable.
- This is the "reveal" moment — use it for your main message, offer, or CTA.
- Design upright — the printer inverts during production.
- The fold at 6" creates a slight crease — avoid critical text directly on it.
- Merge variables like {{name}} can be used anywhere.

notes: Vertical bifold — fold at center (6" from top).
Submit inside artwork upright — printer inverts during production.
